articles.author: Pamela McClintock
articles.title: ‘Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu’ Opens to Series-Low $98M in North America. Does It Even Matter? - The Hollywood Reporter
articles.description: In the post-pandemic era, any title opening to that level would be celebrated, while out-of-this-world exits, especially among kids, could fuel a long run and win over a new generation of fans. Globally, the movie has already amassed more than its production …
articles.content:
The roller-coaster ride that accompanies the opening of a Star Wars movie is over — for now.
The final numbers are in for the long Memorial Day box office, and they show Lucasfilm/Disney’s Star Wars… [+4203 chars]
